eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: North Carolina; at 11:39 PM on JUN 4, 2026 Effective until 11:39 AM JUN 5, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: The North Carolina Center for Missing Persons has issued an AMBER Alert at the request of the Brunswick County Sheriff s Office. The Brunswick County Sheriff s Office is searching for 2 children. Chance Wilcox is a 9-year-old white male, described as 4 ft 8, 230 pounds, with brown hair and brown eyes. It is unknown what he was wearing. Wyatt Wilcox is a 11-year-old white male, described as 5 ft1, 250 pounds, with brown hair and brown eyes. It is unknown what he was wearing. The children were last seen in the area of Sweet Bay Drive in Southport June 5, 2026 at 7:30 pm in Brunswick County. The suspect, Brandon Mark Wilcox, is a 35-year-old white male, described as 6 ft 3, 195 pounds, with brown hair and blue eyes. Vehicle information is not available at this time. If sighted do not approach. Call 9 1 1 or Brunswick County Sheriff s Office at 910 – 253 – 2915.
